name: Full Page Screenshot – Capture & Crop
description: Capture full web pages or visible areas, crop screenshots, preview results, and save them as PNG, JPEG, or WebP.

content_security_policy.extension_pages: script-src 'self'; object-src 'self'; style-src 'self' https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com;
